warnings: This sheet A-11 combines a plan view (แปลนบันได ST.1) and a section view (รูปตัดบันได ST.1) of the same stair connecting the carport (จอดรถ, +0.20) to the living/porch area (เฉลียง/พักผ่อน, +0.50/+0.60) — kept as one file since both views describe the single stair element ST.1.

Independent re-read for Gen 4/t3: matches t2's prior read closely (same location, same level callouts, same finish material text); I read the grid position as 'near grid2-3 x gridA' rather than t2's 'grid1-2 x gridA' — both are approximate free-text estimates since no grid line is drawn directly through this detail box, flagging the discrepancy rather than silently picking one. This is a genuinely low-confidence field either way and needs zoom/cross-reference against the architectural floor plan (หน้า06) to resolve.
Exact individual step count/riser heights remain not confidently countable at this resolution — same conclusion as t2, still flagged for zoom review.
ST.1 location referenced against the main building grid is approximate free-text, not a precise grid intersection.
